name: qodeflow-writefile
title: Write File
description: Performs file system write operations such as writing content to a file, appending content, deleting files, and creating directories

input.name: method
input.description: The file operation to perform (WriteFile, AppendFile, DeleteFile, CreateDirectory)

input.name: filePath
input.description: The path to the file or directory

input.name: content
input.description: The content to write or append to the file

output.name: error
output.description: Error message if the operation failed
